cross_scene_arcs.title: Integration into the Nolan House Community
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Benjamin is accepted into the Nolan House as a resident despite his unusual condition, transitioning from newborn to integrated member of the elderly household.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: newborn with elderly appearance, medically fragile
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as a peer among the elderly, following routines and receiving care
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: dissonance between physical age and mental/behavioral youth

cross_scene_arcs.title: Quest for Autonomy and Purpose Through Work
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Benjamin gradually steps beyond the safety of the house, seeking independence through work and personal experience, culminating in his entry into the workforce and exposure to adult life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: confined to domestic routine under Queenie's care
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: working on a tugboat and mentored by Captain Mike in personal matters
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: job lacks financial stability; emotional isolation remains

cross_scene_arcs.title: Revelation and Reckoning with Origins
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Benjamin forms a bond with Thomas based on shared loss, only to later learn that Thomas is his biological father who abandoned him, reframing their relationship through truth and betrayal.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: son confronting paternal abandonment and the truth of his origins
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Benjamin's struggle to process his father's rejection and the emotional weight of the revelation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic and Emotional Connection with Daisy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Benjamin reconnects with Daisy, deepens intimacy, and ultimately chooses to leave her for her sake, tracing the arc of a love shaped by time and difference.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: reunited after years, emotionally stirred by her transformation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally withdrawn, preparing to leave to allow her a conventional future
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to depart without deepening her pain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Life's Full Circle: From Entry to Exit
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Benjamin enters life as an aged infant and exits as a regressed newborn, bookending his existence within the same domestic space and under the care of loved ones.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: born prematurely aged, accepted into Nolan House with uncertain future
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: dies in infantile form, recognized by Daisy in final moments

cross_scene_arcs.title: Quest for Parental Truth and Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Caroline moves from questioning the journal's authenticity to discovering Benjamin is her father, confronting the emotional fallout, and ultimately gaining tangible evidence of his life abroad, culminating in a resolve to understand her origins.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: skeptical but curious about the journal's significance
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: orphaned but resolved, preparing to take independent next steps
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: what her father meant by 'I'm going...' and why he stopped writing

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mother-Daughter Emotional Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Caroline and Daisy progress from seeking closure at the deathbed to moments of reassurance and regret, marked by a shocking confession of harm, and end with a quiet, reciprocal emotional bond as Daisy dies.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: seeking closure before her mother's death
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: finalizes emotional bond with Daisy through unspoken understanding
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: impact of Daisy's confession that she may have intended to hurt Caroline

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Personal Emotional Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Caroline repeatedly confronts her sense of inadequacy, emotional isolation, and absence from her mother's life, moving from self-doubt to breakdown and eventual composure, but without full resolution of her inner loneliness.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: composes herself and resumes caregiving presence
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: desire for profound love remains unfulfilled

cross_scene_arcs.title: Discovery of Hidden Family Histories
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Caroline uncovers multiple layers of her family's concealed past—her mother’s dance career, the truth of her father’s identity, and physical evidence of his later life—each revelation deepening her understanding of her family’s emotional complexity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: becomes curious about the journal's authenticity
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: in possession of a written message indicating her father was alive and traveling in India
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about the journal's missing pages and the full scope of Benjamin's journey

cross_scene_arcs.title: Childhood Bond to Romantic Longing
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Daisy and Benjamin's relationship evolves from a playful childhood connection to a complex emotional and romantic tension, marked by mutual vulnerability, separation, and unfulfilled intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Daisy is a lively child who captures Benjamin's attention during their first meeting.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Daisy expresses desire for physical and emotional intimacy, but Benjamin withdraws, leaving her feeling rejected.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Benjamin's emotional hesitation prevents full reciprocation of Daisy's romantic advances.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pregnancy and Shared Parenthood
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Daisy's pregnancy becomes a pivotal point in her life, leading to a brief convergence with Benjamin and the assumption of full parental responsibility after his departure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Daisy reveals she is pregnant, creating a moment of deep emotional connection with Benjamin.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Daisy assumes sole care of her child after Benjamin leaves, reaffirming her commitment as a mother.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how she will explain Benjamin's absence to their daughter.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Caregiver Role as Benjamin Regresses
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: As Benjamin regresses into childhood, Daisy transitions from romantic partner to caregiver, becoming his emotional anchor during confusion and ultimately at his death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Daisy calms Benjamin when he becomes disoriented and upset over a routine correction.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Daisy holds Benjamin as he dies, witnessing his final recognition of her.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Benjamin's worsening disorientation and memory loss go unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Final Closure and Peaceful Passing
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Daisy achieves emotional closure through Benjamin's peaceful death and her own, symbolized by the hummingbird, affirming their enduring connection beyond life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Daisy holds Benjamin as he dies, recognizing his final gesture of love.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Daisy dies peacefully, having said goodbye to Benjamin and found peace in the face of death.
